blockdesc-cartographytable-*: <hk>rightmouse</hk>-click with an empty hand on the ink and quill to update the table with your waypoints, or <hk>ctrl</hk> + <hk>rightmouse</hk>-click to update your waypoints. <hk>rightmouse</hk>-click on the table while holding resin to wipe it clean.
blockdesc-advancedcartographytable-*: <hk>rightmouse</hk>-click with an empty hand on the ink and quill to update the table with your explored areas and waypoints, or <hk>ctrl</hk> + <hk>rightmouse</hk>-click to update your waypoints and explored areas. <hk>rightmouse</hk>-click on the table's map while holding resin to wipe it clean.

gamemechanicinfo-sharingwaypoints-title: Game Mechanic: Sharing waypoints and maps
gamemechanicinfo-sharingwaypoints-text:
Cartography Table

A cartography table can be built in the crafting grid using a wooden table, a parchment and an ink and quill. Once the cartography table is placed, rightmouse-click on it to update the cartography table's map with your changes, or ctrl + rightmouse-click to update your map with the changes made by others.

Every table will have its own map, with an unique set of waypoints, so different groups of people can use different tables and only share waypoints within the group.

Updating the cartography table's map

When you update the cartography table's map:

- the waypoints you added on your map will be copied to the cartography table
- the waypoints you edited on your map will be updated on the cartography table
- the waypoints you deleted from your map will be deleted from the cartography table

Updating your map

When you update your map:

- the new waypoints on the cartography table will be added to your map
- the changed waypoints will be updated on your map
- the delted waypoints will be removed from your map

Advanced Cartography Table

An advanced cartography table can be built in the crafting grid using two wooden table, two parchment, an ink and quill and a candle. The advanced cartography table will allow you to share your explored map on top of your waypoints, and it also acts as a source of light thanks to the candle.
gamemechanicinfo-pondering-text:
Introduction

By rightmouse-clicking on a cartography table's map or an advanced cartography table's map while holding a palantir in your hand you can travel in spirit to far away lands, known or unknown.

Preparing for travel

First build a palantir and a cartography table or an advanced cartography table, place the table and collect some psychedelic mushrooms. Open your map and place some palantir travel waypoints (eye icon) in the places that you'd like to see, then update the cartography's table map with the new waypoints.

Astral projection

Once all the preparations are done, eat a psychedelic mushroom, then ponder the cartography table's map by rightmouse-clicking on it with a palantir in your hand to start the trip.
